meaning: adj.轶话的,多轶事趣闻的,轶事一样的
examples: Advocates of the practice have taken issue with his team's use of anecdotal evidence like news accounts to support his conclusion that goal setting is widely over-prescribed.
Anecdotal evidence suggests that sales in the Southwest have slipped.
Nevertheless, anecdotal reports of wind pollination in cycads cannot be ignored.
Anecdotal evidence has suggested that independent work has been a consequence of the weak economy.
It reveals and corroborates the anecdotal evidence that many of us have been exposed to.
